---
title: "Optimization Theory for Modelers"
subtitle: "CORE-016 | Core Mathematics — Year 2"
description: "Optimization is the mathematical engine of model calibration, control, and machine learning. This course covers convex and nonconvex theory, variational methods, and optimal control."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Optimization Theory for Modelers

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
